  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

SCU_HHN_UK33_C1AHS_v1.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 79D
Recv ID: 7BD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 4D
Func Name: SCU

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "A71",
    "soft": "SR2DB-001aa",
    "version": "SR2DB-001aa"

    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)"

    "devicedata": {},
